sprite Class List

Here are the classes, structs, unions and interfaces with brief descriptions:
sprite::visitors::AtImplements Node::operator[]
sprite::payloads::ChildListA payload containing an arbitrary-length list of children
sprite::payloads::ChoiceA payload containing exactly two children for choice nodes
sprite::visitors::CloneImplements Node::clone
sprite::visitors::DestroyPayloadImplements Node::destroy_payload
sprite::FingerprintA fingerprint specification
sprite::payloads::FloatA floating-point payload for the built in Float type
sprite::payloads::FwdA payload for forward reference nodes
sprite::payloads::InPlace< 0 >Zero children
sprite::payloads::InPlace< 1 >One child, in place
sprite::payloads::InPlace< 2 >Two children, in place
sprite::payloads::IntAn integer payload (64 bit) for the built in Int type
sprite::visitors::IterImplements Node::iter
ListModuleThe built-in list module
sprite::LoaderInterface to the module loader
sprite::ModuleInterface to a module
sprite::NodeAn expression node
sprite::Node_< Payload >A complete node. The payload contains tag-specific data
sprite::NodePtrA reference-counting pointer for Node objects
sprite::visitors::PositionImplements Node::position
sprite::ProgramA program definition
sprite::rewrite< CtorOrOper >Rewrite a node to a CTOR or OPER node
sprite::rewrite< CHOICE >Rewrite a node to a CHOICE
sprite::rewrite< FAIL >Rewrite a node to a FAIL
sprite::rewrite< FLOAT >Rewrite a node to a FLOAT
sprite::rewrite< FWD >Rewrite a node to a FWD
sprite::rewrite< INT >Rewrite a node to an INT
sprite::RuntimeErrorThrown to indicate a runtime error in the execution system
sprite::manipulators::setprogramI/O manipulator to set the program
sprite::visitors::StreamOut< Stream >Implements operator<< for nodes
sprite::meta::TagValue< C >A TagValue metaconstant
sprite::payloads::Unused< Bytes >The unused payload; for abstract and failure nodes
sprite::UserModuleA basic implementation of the Module interface
sprite::YieldHandlerBase of a class that handles computation results as they are generated
sprite::YieldHandler_< OutputIterator >A concrete YieldHandler for a particular output iterator type
sprite::YieldHandler_< void >A yield handler that simply discards the output
